case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. OLVIN JOEL CRUZ PEREIRA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, ENNY CUDNY. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT OLIVN JOEL CRUZ PEREIRA. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FKA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREIRA, OLVIN JOEL CRUZ $1,004.93 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,149.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
